name: akm-registry
description: Static registry index for akm stash discovery

scripts.build:refresh: bun run install:akm && bun run build
scripts.validate: bun -e "const idx=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('index.json','utf8'));if(idx.version!==2)throw new Error('bad version');if(!Array.isArray(idx.kits))throw new Error('missing kits');console.log(idx.kits.length+' kits OK')"
